failed_attempts:
let P : Polynomial ℝ := (Polynomial.X - Polynomial.C 1) * (Polynomial.X - Polynomial.C 9) * (Polynomial.X - Polynomial.C 25) * (Polynomial.X - Polynomial.C 49)
  let R : Polynomial ℝ :=
    Polynomial.C (x ^ 2) * (Polynomial.X - Polynomial.C 9) * (Polynomial.X - Polynomial.C 25) * (Polynomial.X - Polynomial.C 49) +
    Polynomial.C (y ^ 2) * (Polynomial.X - Polynomial.C 1) * (Polynomial.X - Polynomial.C 25) * (Polynomial.X - Polynomial.C 49) +
    Polynomial.C (z ^ 2) * (Polynomial.X - Polynomial.C 1) * (Polynomial.X - Polynomial.C 9) * (Polynomial.X - Polynomial.C 49) +
    Polynomial.C (w ^ 2) * (Polynomial.X - Polynomial.C 1) * (Polynomial.X - Polynomial.C 9) * (Polynomial.X - Polynomial.C 25)
  let G : Polynomial ℝ := (Polynomial.X - Polynomial.C 4) * (Polynomial.X - Polynomial.C 16) * (Polynomial.X - Polynomial.C 36) * (Polynomial.X - Polynomial.C 64)
  have h_roots : ∀ t ∈ ({4, 16, 36, 64} : Finset ℝ), (P - R - G).eval t = 0 := by
    intro t ht
    simp only [Finset.mem_insert, Finset.mem_singleton] at ht
    rcases ht with rfl | rfl | rfl | rfl
    · have : (3 : ℝ) * -5 * -21 * -45 ≠ 0 := by norm_num
      field_simp [this] at h₀; rw [Polynomial.eval_sub, Polynomial.eval_sub]; simp [P, R, G, h₀]; ring
    · have : (15 : ℝ) * 7 * -9 * -33 ≠ 0 := by norm_num
      field_simp [this] at h₁; rw [Polynomial.eval_sub, Polynomial.eval_sub]; simp [P, R, G, h₁]; ring
    · have : (35 : ℝ) * 27 * 11 * -13 ≠ 0 := by norm_num
      field_simp [this] at h₂; rw [Polynomial.eval_sub, Polynomial.eval_sub]; simp [P, R, G, h₂]; ring
    · have : (63 : ℝ) * 55 * 39 * 15 ≠ 0 := by norm_num
      field_simp [this] at h₃; rw [Polynomial.eval_sub, Polynomial.eval_sub]; simp [P, R, G, h₃]; ring
  have deg_le : (P - R - G).degree ≤ 3 := by
    have dP : P.degree = 4 := by compute_degree
    have dG : G.degree = 4 := by compute_degree
    have dR : R.degree ≤ 3 := by compute_degree
    have mP : P.Monic := by monic
    have mG : G.Monic := by monic
    have : (P - G).degree ≤ 3 := Polynomial.degree_sub_lt dP dG (by rw [mP.leadingCoeff, mG.leadingCoeff])
    rw [sub_sub]; apply (Polynomial.degree_add_le _ _).trans; apply max_le this dR
  have poly_zero : P - R - G = 0 := Polynomial.eq_zero_of_degree_lt_card_roots (by norm_num) h_roots deg_le
  have coeff3 : (P - R - G).coeff 3 = 0 := by rw [poly_zero, Polynomial.coeff_zero]
  rw [Polynomial.coeff_sub, Polynomial.coeff_sub] at coeff3
  have cP : P.coeff 3 = -84 := by rw [P]; ring_nf; simp
  have cG : G.coeff 3 = -120 := by rw [G]; ring_nf; simp
  have cR : R.coeff 3 = x^2 + y^2 + z^2 + w^2 := by rw [R]; ring_nf; simp
  linarith
